mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_TUG_FEE(ID, ITEM_CD, TRADE_TYPE, SHIP_LENGTH, SHIP_TYPE_CODE, RATE, TAX_RATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{itemCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipLength, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{shipTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_TUG_FEE
ITEM_CD = #{itemCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_LENGTH = #{shipLength, jdbcType=INTEGER}, SHIP_TYPE_CODE = #{shipTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RATE = #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TAX_RATE = #{taxRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
